data.body: Implemented item 9.3 in worktree janitor/item-9.3-facade-reads. RESULT: largest import SCC 36->35 (rebar._reads left the cycle); cross-package cycle pairs 11->7 (removed _commands::_reads, _io::_reads, _reads::llm, _reads::rebar); modules-in-cycles 49->48. Baseline ratcheted. Changes: (1) new stdlib-only leaf src/rebar/_errors.py holds RebarError+ConcurrencyError; __init__ re-exports them (rebar.RebarError identity preserved); _reads sources RebarError from the leaf -> _reads is now a leaf. (2) Every function-local read call-site in llm/{spec_scan,operations,completion,pai_tools,plan_review/pass1,plan_review/orchestrator,plan_review/attest,workflow/steps,workflow/gate_ops} now uses 'from rebar import _reads'; mixed scopes keep 'import rebar' only for writes (comment/tag/edit) or verify_signature. (3) Tests: 34 read-mock sites retargeted from the facade re-export to the single seam rebar._reads (monkeypatch string form). Gates: make lint + make check (mypy) green; FULL suite 4324 passed / 48 skipped / 0 failed; import-cycle + reducer-inversion contract tests green. Pushing to Gerrit for review.
